uin_code.source_quote: IRDA of India Registration No.:108 • CIN: U85110MH2000PLC128425 • UIN: TATHLIP21257V022021

min_entry_age.source_quote: Newborn baby (aged upto 90 days); dependent child entry standard 91 days

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry per Policy Schedule (Tata AIG MediCare Premier brochure: 18-65 years)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured options per Policy Schedule (MediCare Premier: 5L/7.5L/10L/15L/20L/25L/30L/50L/1Cr)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period for illness (standard IRDAI Excl03)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period (Code-Excl02): Expenses ... shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: B21. Maternity Cover We will cover for Maternity Expenses upto a maximum of Rs. 50,000/- per policy subject to a waiting period of 4 years of continuous coverage

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: B2. Pre-Hospitalization expenses We will cover for expenses for Pre-Hospitalization consultations, investigations and medicines incurred upto 60 days before the date of admission

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: B3. Post-Hospitalization expenses ... incurred upto 90 days after discharge from the hospital.

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: B4. Day Care Procedures ... The list of such day care procedures covered is available on our website (www.tataaig.com)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: qualified registered AYUSH Medical Practitioner (AYUSH coverage standard inclusion)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: B21. Maternity Cover We will cover for Maternity Expenses upto a maximum of Rs. 50,000/- per policy ... In case of birth of a girl child, the maximum limit ... would be Rs. 60,000/-

newborn_coverage.source_quote: B22. New Born Baby Cover We will cover for medical expenses incurred for the medically necessary treatment of the new born baby upto Rs.10,000/- for complications related to delivery

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses (standard inclusion in Tata AIG MediCare Premier)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus accrued ... The maximum cumulative bonus shall not exceed 100% of the Sum Insured in any Policy Year (rate per claim-free year per Policy Schedule, typically 50%)

restoration_benefit.value: Restore Benefit: automatic restoration of Basic Sum Insured upon exhaustion, once per policy period
restoration_benefit.source_quote: B7. Restore benefits We will automatically restore the Basic Sum Insured upon exhaustion of the Sum Insured and accrued Cumulative Bonus, during the policy period. This benefit can be availed once during the policy period

room_rent_capping.value: Per Policy Schedule (Single Private AC Room or higher; voluntary copay for higher category)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent means the amount charged (per Policy Schedule entitlement)

copayment_pct.source_quote: No mandatory base copay (voluntary copay add-on)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; Tata AIG advertises 7,200+ network hospitals

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: Tata AIG MediCare Premier: 24-month PED, maternity ₹50K (₹60K girl child) with 4-year waiting, restore benefit once per policy period.
